name: airtight
description: Secure-coding gates for AI-written code. 70 numbered gates mapped to OWASP Top 10 and CWE, plus a pre-write guard that denies the failures it can prove: open routes, IDOR, missing CSRF tokens, interpolated queries and shell commands, raw HTML sinks, unverified webhooks, any-origin CORS with credentials, passwords under fast hashes, unbounded credential endpoints, and leaked secrets.
